questions.question: What is the tightest upper bound time complexity of building a binary heap from an unsorted array of n elements?

What problem class does a decision problem belong to if its affirmative solutions can be verified in polynomial time by a deterministic Turing machine?
Which data structure is inherently used to implement Breadth-First Search (BFS) on a graph?
What is the worst-case time complexity of finding an element in a self-balancing binary search tree (like an AVL tree) with n nodes?
Which sorting algorithm has a stable matching variant known as the Gale-Shapley algorithm?
answers: Stable Matching isn't a sorting algorithm
questions.correctAnswer: Stable Matching isn't a sorting algorithm
